message: Jake
Kristy
Welcome.
Hey,
You look good, you're okay now, right?
Cut the comforting words; you don't mean that.
Not here.
I wonder where they went. I can't imagine they'd wander far in that condition.
They're still not back.
I'm starting to worry.
Look.
Talk.
Listen.
Think.
System.
Surroundings.
About Eva.
About Günter.
About　them.
Save.
End the game.
You're exhausted.
These hands of mine have taken lives.
These hands of mine...
Ah, what should I do now?
I don't know what's what anymore.
Their pained expression brought dull pain to my heart.
I had no energy left to think; only intense emptiness surrounded me.
It was still tidied up, just like before things changed; no dirt to be found on the walls.
It's a room that feels warm and tasteful, having an atmosphere that brings peace to visitors.
I once believed things were getting better, but now...
...the state looks the same as when they pointed a knife at me.
She seems anxious and somewhat restless, as if she is scared of something.
That's the atmosphere.
What should I do?
Did something happen?
I noticed that I
realized the person I saw in my dream was killed.
Huh?
I thought it was just a dream, but could it have been real?
What the hell does this mean?
So you see, I actually held a grudge against Eva Courtney.
Then she ended up dead, right?
Are you saying it was your doing?
Doing? No way.
I don't think that’s true.
But I can't deny I have some thoughts about it.
What should I do?
Could it be that I killed someone with my own hands?
Do you mean there's a motive to kill Eva?
That's right. I was angry about that article.
I protested to her many times.
That woman seemed to be involved with Guy.
I couldn't forgive that.
Then, I killed her in my dream.
It must have been just a dream. You should stop thinking such foolish things.
But, I even pointed a knife at you.
I told Günter about it, but still, I
Forget those foolish thoughts. You’re just tired.
Am I going to become a murderer like this?
I did it.
What should I do?
What should I do?
You did talk to Günter about it, right?
That's true, but.
Still, I can't help but.
It's okay, just go see counseling with Günter.
No, that's not allowed.
I'm definitely the one doing it.
Without even realizing it.
Umm, I can't forgive anyone who tries to take Gai away.
Since I noticed how flashy Gai's relationships are.
I've been holding onto.
a lot of things in my heart, you know.
You're overthinking it.
No, even though Günter says I should stay calm, I just can't have any confidence in myself.
Ah, even if I go to counseling, it doesn't mean anything anymore.
Saying I'm a murderer, what kind of thing is that to say?
Being so in love with Gai that I got mentally unwell, and now having delusions about committing murder.
How sad.
There's no way someone could kill anyone. Even if it's someone you hate that much to want to kill, there's just no way.
※※※ It's a bug ※※※
Ｖ＝
Ｎ＝
